title: GOOGL — laggard or not
question: Was Google really a laggard, and what drove the 2025-26 re-rating?
finding: Never the laggard the tape implied. Clean prices show GOOGL +148% (beats 4 of its 5 megacap peers, loses only to NVDA); the "laggard-to-leader" story was a data-corruption artifact, and only the Sep-2025 DOJ antitrust-remedies catalyst (+11.0%, p=0.007) is statistically real.
